headline: Amended FICA Tax Return Filing for Refunds Preparation Checklist — Los Angeles
articleBody:
Amended FICA Tax Return Filing for Refunds Preparation Checklist for Los Angeles Clients

Before your Amended FICA Tax Return Filing for Refunds appointment with FICA Tax Credits & Refunds, make sure you have the following ready:

1. Payroll records
2. Tip reports
3. Tax returns
4. Employee w-2s
5. Credit card statements

Contact FICA Tax Credits & Refunds at (213) 537-5613 to get started.
